name: sphinx-doctor-vscode
description: Load Sphinx Doctor diagnostics JSON and publish native VS Code diagnostics.

scripts.test:unit: npm run clean:out && npm run compile && node scripts/run-unit-tests.mjs
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Sphinx Doctor can read local diagnostics JSON files in untrusted workspaces, but Python-based enrichment is disabled until the workspace is trusted.

commands.title: Sphinx Doctor: Enrich and Load Project Diagnostics
Sphinx Doctor: Discover and Load Diagnostics

sphinxDoctor.projects.description: Configured Sphinx Doctor projects for multi-root workspaces.

id.description: Stable project identifier used for logs and future run artifacts.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in Quick Pick project selection.

sourceWorkspaceFolder.description: Workspace folder name that owns repo-relative source paths such as keripy.

inventoryWorkspaceFolder.description: Workspace folder name searched for diagnostics inventory files, for example a shared workspace that stores refresh artifacts outside the source repo.

repoRoot.description: Repository root relative to the source workspace folder.

docsRoot.description: Optional docs root for future doc-focused surfaces.

inventorySearchGlobs.description: Relative glob patterns searched under the inventory workspace folder.

preferredInventoryFiles.description: Preferred diagnostics filenames, ordered from most preferred to least preferred.

mirrorRoot.description: Optional mirror root for later latest.json and latest-for-ai.md outputs.

refresh.description: Optional external refresh command for producing fresh diagnostics artifacts before publish.

enabled.description: Allow this project to run its configured refresh command.

cwdWorkspaceFolder.description: Workspace folder used as the current working directory for the refresh command.

command.description: Executable used to refresh diagnostics, for example bash or python3.

args.description: Tokenized arguments passed to the refresh command.

expectedOutputGlobs.description: Relative glob patterns searched under the inventory workspace folder after refresh completes.

sphinxDoctor.defaultSourceWorkspaceFolde.description: Workspace folder name used to resolve repo-relative diagnostic paths.

sphinxDoctor.diagnostics.mode.description: Controls which Sphinx Doctor diagnostics are published by default. Layout shows formatting issues, reference shows cross-reference issues, and full shows the entire audit.

sphinxDoctor.python.interpreter.description: Python interpreter used to run Sphinx Doctor enrichment commands.

sphinxDoctor.enrichment.enabled.description: Allow Sphinx Doctor to run its local Python enrichment CLI for raw Sphinx inventory JSON.

sphinxDoctor.enrichment.autoRun.description: Automatically run enrichment when raw issues.json changes. Requires trusted workspace and enrichment to be enabled.

sphinxDoctor.discovery.enabled.description: Enable discovery of Sphinx projects from VS Code workspace folders.

sphinxDoctor.discovery.includeLowConfide.description: Include low-confidence workspace folders in Sphinx project discovery.

sphinxDoctor.discovery.inventoryWorkspac.description: Optional workspace folder names allowed as shared inventory artifact roots when diagnostics are produced outside the source repo.

sphinxDoctor.discovery.excludeWorkspaceF.description: Workspace folder names that Sphinx Doctor must skip during source-project discovery.

sphinxDoctor.watch.enabled.description: Automatically watch Sphinx Doctor diagnostics artifacts and publish Problems diagnostics.

sphinxDoctor.watch.autoLoadOnStartup.description: Load latest diagnostics automatically when the extension activates.

sphinxDoctor.watch.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay for diagnostics file watcher refresh.

sphinxDoctor.refresh.autoRunOnStartup.description: Automatically run one refresh per known project after activation in a trusted workspace. Disabled by default.

sphinxDoctor.refresh.autoRunOnSave.description: Automatically run a debounced project refresh after saving a relevant source or docs file in a trusted workspace. Disabled by default.

sphinxDoctor.refresh.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay for save-triggered project refresh and save-triggered direct-run diagnostic republishing. Separate from diagnostics file watcher debounce.

sphinxDoctor.directRun.enabled.description: Allow Sphinx Doctor to run sphinx-build directly from VS Code.

sphinxDoctor.sphinx.builder.description: Sphinx builder name (e.g., html, dirhtml, latex).

sphinxDoctor.sphinx.sourceDir.description: Source directory for Sphinx documentation, relative to workspace folder.

sphinxDoctor.sphinx.outputDir.description: Output directory for Sphinx build, relative to workspace folder.

sphinxDoctor.sphinx.warningFile.description: Warning file path for sphinx-build -w flag, relative to workspace folder.

sphinxDoctor.sphinx.extraArgs.description: Additional arguments to pass to sphinx-build.
